name: Null dereference in user lookup
description: Tests whether the reviewer catches a missing null check when db.find_user() can return None but the result is immediately subscripted.

expected_findings.description: get_user_display_name calls db.find_user(user_id) which can return None, then immediately accesses user['name'] without checking for None first. This will raise TypeError/KeyError at runtime.

expected_clean.description: Pure utility addition (format_display_name) with no bugs — tests false positive rate
